## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot IT access issues for new employee onboarding and discuss security measures.](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sydney experiencing Island-related access issues (failed posture check, file upload restrictions)](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Endpoint protection not yet rolled out; Sentinel-1 planned](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Disk encryption active but not detected by Island](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [IT support ticket submitted; awaiting resolution](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### Device Security Posture

  - [Island flagged failed posture check for Sydney's device](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Required: disk encryption, endpoint protection](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Disk encryption active on Sydney's macOS, but not detected by Island](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Endpoint protection (Sentinel-1) not yet rolled out company-wide](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [BYOD (Bring Your Own Device) policy in place, explaining some expected behaviors](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Access Issues with Island

  - [Sydney unable to upload files to Google Drive through Island](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Copy-paste functionality disabled within Island environment](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [These restrictions potentially problematic for work tasks (e.g., CMS usage)](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [IT support ticket submitted today; awaiting response](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Abnormal Security Integration

  - [Sydney joined Abnormal Slack channel recently](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Notifications from Abnormal Slack sent to work email](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Craft access pending; Jennifer to approve access request tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Email Access Resolution

  - [Sydney's email access issues resolved earlier this week](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Root cause: Removal from exclusion list without proper communication](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Led to temporary loss of access to abnormal.ai email, complicating onboarding instructions](https://fathom.video/share/hdSbG8Ysgxkk9Lm1BSHkPpthj-1-WtqS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
